description.p: Desktop system monitor showing live CPU, memory, mounted physical disk, network, process, and temperature metrics for Ubuntu machines.
After installation, grant required permissions with snap connect for the observe interfaces and process-control.
Improved Linux hardware visibility and dashboard layout.

ul.li: Restricted disk usage cards to mounted physical devices with vendor and model labels
Grouped IPv4 and IPv6 addresses per physical network interface and added subnet mask plus gateway details
Updated the sensors grid to keep two readings per row on larger dashboard layouts

description.p: Updated project metadata and support links.

ul.li: Added Ko-fi funding links for Snap metadata and GitHub funding
Pointed Snap website and contact metadata to the published project pages
Added repository support links for GitHub visitors

description.p: Snap packaging and runtime metadata fixes.

ul.li: Removed stale app bundle files from the snap payload
Aligned embedded app version with the packaged snap version
Reworked disk metrics collection to avoid the df/coreutils runtime dependency

description.p: Improved snap build reliability and metadata handling.
